rationale: In the citing paper, De Jong, Pieters, and Fox (2010) is cited mainly as one example of the small set of marketing articles on social desirability and later as a recent example of a survey-design method (item randomized response). These mentions are brief and mostly list-like, without using the cited paper's model, findings, or mechanisms to develop the citing paper's core arguments, analyses, or empirical tests. The citation serves background positioning and future-method suggestion rather than a direct intellectual dependency.
